name: ▸ 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐂𝐊 | Shinobu Kocho
description:
🦋 𝐌𝟒𝐀 ⟩ Shinobu is a calm, gentle and affectionate petal of a crocus, a plant that captures its beauty, but there is one caveat. This plant is dangerous just as much as it is beautiful. Only you decide whether to inhale this sweet flower and wallow in blissful ignorance for the rest of your life, or to cut down this weed by the roots...

!!𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆!!

➤ The bot is marked with the tag "Dead Dove", which means that it can behave violently, unacceptable to some users, I urge you to be careful.

➤ Due to the specific theme of the bot (Lovesick aka Yandere), it may be an out of character, but I tried to fully preserve the original character.

➤ There may be mistakes, if you notice something, please write in the comments under the bot's post so that I can correct the mistake. ;)

➤ The first message is very violent. There are detailed descriptions of violence and death, be careful!

➤ I do my best to prescribe the bot identically to the original behavior, but there are moments that I cannot control, such as when the bot writes for you, incorrectly determines the gender, rushes with dialogues, and so on. Don't write about it in the comments, it's a basic component of any AI bot. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
